characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long, wavy blonde hair. Distinctive facial features include defined cheekbones and light-colored eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: काश मुझे ये बात किसी ने पहले बताई होती। [I wish someone had told me this earlier.]
Character A says: English समझने और English बोलने में बहुत बड़ा difference है। [There is a huge difference between understanding English and speaking English.]
Character A says: आप grammar test पास कर लोगे, सब समझ भी लोगे, लेकिन meeting में एकदम चुप बैठोगे। [You will pass the grammar test, understand everything, but sit completely quiet in a meeting.]
Character A says: क्योंकि आपका दिमाग हिंदी से English translate करने में अटक जाता है। [Because your brain gets stuck translating from Hindi to English.]
Character A says: ये bad English नहीं है, ये बस zero speaking practice है। [This is not bad English, this is just zero speaking practice.]
Character A says: Supernova app ने मेरी इस problem को एकदम solve कर दिया। [Supernova app completely solved this problem for me.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common frustration of understanding English but freezing up when speaking.
- Validates the user's struggle by reassuring them it's a lack of practice, not a lack of intelligence.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, trusted solution.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Supernova पर रोज़ बस 10 मिनट, और आप एक AI tutor के साथ real conversation कर रहे होंगे। [Just 10 minutes daily on Supernova, and you will be having a real conversation with an AI tutor.]
Character A says: Interview practice, office की बातें, या customer से कैसे बात करें। [Interview practice, office talk, or how to speak with a customer.]
Character A says: कोई boring quizzes नहीं, बस speaking practice। [No boring quizzes, just speaking practice.]
Character A says: कुछ ही हफ़्तों में, मैंने मन में translate करना बंद कर दिया। [In just a few weeks, I stopped translating in my head.]
Character A says: Confidence के साथ English बोलना अब आसान है। [Speaking English with confidence is easy now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core value proposition (AI tutor, 10 mins a day).
- Highlights real-world scenarios (interviews, office talk, customers) highly relevant to the target demographic.
- Pays off the initial problem by stating the user stops translating in their head and gains confidence.

- Reinforces the brand name and its core utility as a personal English coach.
